body.zh-TW:
MemTrace 實作 **Model Context Protocol (MCP)**，讓 AI agent 可以將 MemTrace 作為 context provider。

**Transport**：本地 stdio（CLI）或 HTTP + SSE（`memtrace serve --mcp`）

**Resources**（agent 讀取用）：
- `memtrace://workspaces` — 知識庫清單
- `memtrace://node/{id}` — 節點完整內容（含走訪統計）
- `memtrace://node/{id}/edges` — 節點的所有 Edge

**Tools**（agent 操作用）：`search_nodes`、`get_node`、`create_node`、`update_node`、`list_edges`、`create_edge`、`traverse_edge`（觸發 co-access boost）、`rate_path`（提交評分）

Agent 每次沿 Edge 移動時應呼叫 `traverse_edge`，讓常用路徑保持活躍，抵抗 decay。
body.en:
MemTrace implements the **Model Context Protocol (MCP)** so AI agents can use MemTrace as a context provider.

**Transport**: local stdio (CLI) or HTTP + SSE (`memtrace serve --mcp`)

**Resources** (agent reads):
- `memtrace://workspaces` — list of Knowledge Bases
- `memtrace://node/{id}` — full node content with traversal stats
- `memtrace://node/{id}/edges` — all edges for a node

**Tools** (agent actions): `search_nodes`, `get_node`, `create_node`, `update_node`, `list_edges`, `create_edge`, `traverse_edge` (triggers co-access boost), `rate_path` (submit rating)

Agents should call `traverse_edge` each time they follow an edge, keeping frequently used paths alive against decay.
